Hi Eliane, thanks for joining the call. I am Greg, from the medical-technology team in Austin. So, tell me a little about your project.
Thanks, Greg. To give you a bit of context, I am a gynecologist, and I am opening a fertility clinic in São Paulo next year.
That sounds exciting. And what are you looking for in a technology partner?
The reason I bring this up is simple. I do not just want a supplier. What I mean is, I need reliable equipment and fast support.
That makes sense. Our incubators are state-of-the-art, and our team follows up within twenty-four hours.
That said, I have to be honest about the budget. Quality matters more to me than the lowest price.
I appreciate that. Let me outline a plan and send you the action items after this call.
Perfect. Could you also clarify the timeline for installation?
Of course. To wrap up, I will email a full proposal, and we will debrief next week. Thank you, Eliane.
To give you a bit of context, I run a fertility clinic in São Paulo.
What I mean is, I need reliable support, not just cheap machines.
The reason I bring this up is that I want a long-term partner.
That said, quality matters more to me than the lowest price.
To wrap up, let me confirm the action items and follow up by email.

Hi Eliane. You are halfway through the program now, so let us take a moment to reflect. When we started, you told me your biggest fear was freezing on an important call. Listen to how far you have come. You can now articulate a complex plan, clarify a point when someone looks confused, and outline your vision in a clear order. What is still developing is your speed when you feel nervous, and that is completely normal. My advice for the second half is simple: keep using your fluency markers, debrief after every real conversation, and be patient with yourself. You are doing beautifully.

Hi Eliane, this is Greg from the medical-technology team in Austin, Texas. Thanks for a great video call earlier. I wanted to follow up and confirm the action items on our side. To give you a bit of context, we work with several new clinics across Latin America, so your project is a perfect fit. We are going to send you a full proposal by Friday, including timelines and support options. That said, if anything is unclear, please call me and I will clarify right away. We are really excited about a long-term partnership with your clinic. Talk soon, and have a great week.
